texto: Notice that your judgments of what exists are the same kind of judgments you make about how to live your life. There aren't two kinds of things we do: judge what exists and decide what we want to do about it. Fundamentally, there is one kind of thing we do: live our lives. And we can reflect on this activity more or less abstractly.
explicacao: Citação de Eric Kaplan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Notice that your judgments of what exists are the same kind of judgments you make about how to li…” articula reflexao, humor, metaphysics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como metaphysics e ontology.

There aren't two kinds of things we do: judge what exists and decide what we want to do about it. Fundamentally, there is one kind of thing we do: live our lives.
